title: Veinteañera, divorciada y fantástica
posterAlt: Veinteañera, divorciada y fantástica (2020) movie poster
tmdbOverview: Regina, our young protagonist, always dreamed of getting married. And she did it - but the dream lasted much less than she thought and now she has to face life in a very funny way as a divorcee.
synopsis: Released in 2020, Veinteañera, divorciada y fantástica is a comedy film in Spanish. It has a 5.1 rating on IMDb. A standout of 2020s cinema, it earns its spot on our lists. An official age rating was not available at the time of writing.
